name: Doxycycline
description: Spectrum latum tetracyclinum antibioticum. Vulnus oralis prophylaxis alternative pro aegris penicillino-allergicis. Efficax etiam contra organismos atypicos et quosdam morbos vector-feros (prophylaxis malaria in locis endemicis).
dose: 100 mg PO singulis horis 12 x 7 diebus.
window: Incipe intra 3 horas laesae vulneris prophylaxis.
contraindications: Graviditas (causas dente foetus inhibitionis et ossis inhibitionis)
warnings: CONTINCTUS in graviditate -- utere amoxicillino loco.
CONTINCTUS in parvulis sub VIII annis.
Photosensitivity - patientem monere ne solis nuditatem.
Cibi calcii pinguia, antacida vel ferri non sumes effusio deterit.

pediatric.dose: Contraindicated sub annis VIII. Aevum 8+: 2-4 mg/kg/ dies dividitur q12h (max 100 mg/dosis).

obstetric.note: CONTINCTUS in graviditate -- laedat foetus. Amoxicillinum pro utere.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
